heading: Short title
label: 58 Short title
text: This subchapter may be cited as the “Federal Trade Commission Act”.
notes: Amendment of SectionFor repeal of amendment renumbering this section by , see Termination Date of 2006 Amendment note below.section 13 of Pub. L. 109–455

Short Title of 2021 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–287, § 1134 Stat. 4882Jan. 5, 2021“This Act [enacting provisions set out as a note under ] may be cited as the ‘Combating Pandemic Scams Act of 2020’.”section 52 of this title

Short Title of 2018 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–271, title VIII, § 8021132 Stat. 4082Oct. 24, 2018“This subtitle [subtitle B (§§ 8021–8023) of title VIII of , enacting and provisions set out as a note under ] may be cited as the ‘Opioid Addiction Recovery Fraud Prevention Act of 2018’.”Pub. L. 115–271section 45d of this titlesection 45d of this title

Short Title of 2016 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 114–274, § 1130 Stat. 1401Dec. 14, 2016“This Act [enacting and provisions set out as a note under ] may be cited as the ‘Better Online Ticket Sales Act of 2016’ or the ‘BOTS Act of 2016’.”section 45c of this titlesection 45c of this title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 114–258, § 1130 Stat. 1355Dec. 14, 2016“This Act [enacting ] may be cited as the ‘Consumer Review Fairness Act of 2016’.”section 45b of this title

Short Title of 2006 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–455, § 1120 Stat. 3372Dec. 22, 2006“This Act [enacting sections 57b–2a, 57b–2b, 57c–1, and 57c–2 of this title, amending this section, sections 44, 45, 46, 56, and 57b–2 of this title, and , Banks and Banking, and enacting provisions set out as notes under ] may be cited as the ‘Undertaking Spam, Spyware, And Fraud Enforcement With Enforcers beyond Borders Act of 2006’ or the ‘U.S. SAFE WEB Act of 2006’.”section 3412 of Title 12section 44 of this title[, set out above, repealed effective , see , as amended, set out as a Termination Date of 2006 Amendment note under .]Section 1 of Pub. Short Title of 1996 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 104–216, § 1110 Stat. 3019Oct. 1, 1996“This Act [amending ] may be cited as the ‘Federal Trade Commission Reauthorization Act of 1996’.”section 57c of this title

Short Title of 1994 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–312, § 1(a)108 Stat. 1691Aug. 26, 1994“This Act [enacting , amending this section and sections 45, 53, 57a, 57b–1, 57b–2, and 57c of this title, and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 45 and 57c of this title] may be cited as the ‘Federal Trade Commission Act Amendments of 1994’.”section 57b–5 of this title

Short Title of 1980 Amendment, , , provided that “This Act [enacting sections 57a–1 and 57b–1 to 57b–4 of this title, amending this section and sections 45, 46, 50, 57a, and 57c of this title, and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 45, 46, 57a, 57a–1, and 57c of this title] may be cited as the ‘Federal Trade Commission Improvements Act of 1980’.”Pub. L. 96–252, § 194 Stat. 374May 28, 1980
